phases.name: Studio Next.js shell + SDK proof

phases.name: Fly.io infra validation
artifacts: Validated: flyctl install + auth + app create + remote build + image push + machine provision + TLS + DNS + HTTP 200 + app destroy cycle
Test cost: ~$0.01, app torn down immediately
phases.notes: Real OpenClaw workspace image (infra/workspace/) not yet deployed — deferred to G2 when a real user provisions

phases.name: Port claw-code P1 patterns
completed: P1.3 Worker boot lifecycle (6-state machine + registry) ✅
remaining: P1.4 Session control HTTP API (pause/resume/fork endpoints) — deferred until async loop is wired

phases.name: Studio live panel (pragmatic middle)
artifacts: Live metrics: protocol version, RPC methods, model, provider, tools, agents, workflows, approvals, traces
Status badge with pulse animation when connected, graceful offline state
End-to-end verified: gateway:4317 + studio:4319 both HTTP 200
phases.notes: Full StudioLayout template editor + template marketplace still pending — deferred to E3 when there's user demand and a firmer backend decision. The current live panel is more useful day-to-day than a half-wired editor.

phases.name: Full Studio template editor + marketplace
phases.reason: Needs backend decision (Convex project vs file-backed HTTP) + real user demand. StudioLayout is preserved in apps/studio/_legacy/ for future port.

phases.name: Full OpenClaw workspace deploy
phases.reason: Deploy heavy infra/workspace image to Fly as claws-workspace-base. Deferred until a real user provisioning request.

phases.name: Tests + gateway session API + live agent tree in Studio
artifacts: 67/67 tests passing, typecheck clean, end-to-end verified
phases.notes: D2 ports are now production-wired. Studio has a live agent tree view at http://localhost:4319
